objectives: Discuss social issues, inequality, and current events in Spanish
Use formal and neutral language for sensitive topics
Express political opinions with appropriate hedging
Navigate discussions about rights, justice, and social change

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Mariana
dialogue_blocks.text: ¿Qué opinas sobre las manifestaciones que tuvieron lugar la semana pasada?
dialogue_blocks.translation: What do you think about the demonstrations that took place last week?
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ke oˈpinas ˈsoβɾe las manifesˈtaθjones ke tuˈβjeɾon luˈɣaɾ la seˈmana paˈsaða]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Héctor
dialogue_blocks.text: Me parece que la ciudadanía tiene todo el derecho de hacer escuchar su voz.
dialogue_blocks.translation: I think citizens have every right to make their voice heard.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [me paˈɾeθe ke la θjuðaˈðania ˈtjene ˈtoðo el deˈɾeʧo ðe aˈθeɾ eskuˈʧaɾ su ˈβoθ]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Mariana
dialogue_blocks.text: La desigualdad económica sigue siendo uno de los problemas más profundos de nuestra sociedad.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Economic inequality continues to be one of the deepest problems in our society.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [la ðeziɣwalˈðað ekonomiˈka ˈsiɣe ˈsjendo uno ðe los pɾoˈβlemas ˈmas pɾoˈfundos]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Héctor
dialogue_blocks.text: Absolutamente. Se han hecho algunos avances, pero todavía queda mucho por hacer.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Absolutely. Some progress has been made, but there's still much to do.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [absolutaˈmente ‖ se an ˈeʧo alˈɡunos aˈβanθes ˈpeɾo toˈðaβia ˈkeða ˈmuʧo poɾ aˈθeɾ]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Mariana
dialogue_blocks.text: La corrupción sigue siendo un obstáculo enorme para el desarrollo del país.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Corruption continues to be an enormous obstacle to the country's development.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [la korupˈθjon ˈsiɣe ˈsjendo un obsˈtakulo eˈnoɾme ˈpaɾa el ðesaˈroʝo ðel paˈis]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Héctor
dialogue_blocks.text: Es que sin transparencia y rendición de cuentas, cualquier reforma es difícil de implementar.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Because without transparency and accountability, any reform is difficult to implement.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [es ke sin tɾanspaˈɾenθja i rendiˈθjon ðe ˈkwentas ‖ kwalˈkjeɾ reˈfoɾma es diˈfiθil]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Mariana
dialogue_blocks.text: Aunque el panorama es complicado, me alegra ver más jóvenes comprometidos con el cambio social.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Although the landscape is complicated, I'm glad to see more young people committed to social change.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ˈauŋke el panoˈɾama es kompliˈkaðo ‖ me aˈleɣɾa βeɾ ˈmas ˈxoβenes kompɾomeˈtiðos]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Héctor
dialogue_blocks.text: Totalmente. El cambio empieza cuando la gente se informa y participa activamente.
dialogue_blocks.translation: Totally. Change begins when people become informed and actively participate.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [totaˈmente ‖ el ˈkambjo emˈpjeθa ˈkwando la ˈxente se inˈfoɾma i paɾˈtiθipa aktiˈβamente]

exercises.instruction: Escoge la expresión más neutral y apropiada para un debate serio
exercises.question: How do you introduce a sensitive political opinion without being aggressive?

options.text: Desde mi perspectiva, creo que es importante analizar este tema con cuidado.

feedback.correct: ¡Correcto! 'Desde mi perspectiva' + hedging language opens a political discussion respectfully and invites dialogue rather than confrontation.
feedback.incorrect: Hedging phrases like 'desde mi perspectiva' and 'creo que' are essential for respectful political discussion. Avoid absolute statements in sensitive debates.

exercises.instruction: Une el término político con su definición

pairs.english: the right to vote in elections
laws passed by a governing body
work stoppage by employees to demand rights

exercises.instruction: Completa el análisis social con el vocabulario correcto

dialogue.speaker: Analista
dialogue.text: La _____ económica entre ricos y pobres sigue creciendo en México. (desigualdad)

dialogue.speaker: Analista
dialogue.text: Se necesita mayor _____ para combatir la corrupción gubernamental. (transparencia)

dialogue.speaker: Analista
dialogue.text: La _____ civil tiene un papel crucial en presionar por el cambio. (sociedad)

dialogue.speaker: Analista
dialogue.text: Sin respeto a los _____ humanos, no hay democracia verdadera. (derechos)

speaking_rubric.title: Un problema social importante
speaking_rubric.scenario: Present a social issue that matters to you — a problem in society, what causes it, what has been done (passive), and what should be done (subjunctive). Use neutral, respectful language.
speaking_rubric.prompt: Describe un problema social importante usando vocabulario político, pasiva y subjuntivo.

sample_response.text: La desigualdad educativa es uno de los problemas más urgentes en México. Se ha demostrado que el acceso a la educación varía enormemente según el nivel económico. Es fundamental que el gobierno invierta más en escuelas públicas para que todos los niños tengan las mismas oportunidades.
sample_response.ipa: [la ðeziɣwalˈðað eðukaˈtiβa es uno ðe los pɾoˈβlemas ˈmas uɾˈxentes]

cultural_notes.formality: Discussing politics in Mexico requires awareness of regional sensitivities. Avoiding strong partisan positions in mixed company is wise — Mexicans often express political opinions through irony, humor, and euphemism rather than direct confrontation.
cultural_notes.gestures: Raising open hands while saying 'la ciudadanía' signals inclusion and democratic principles.
cultural_notes.regional_variations: Puerto Rico has unique political status discussions (statehood vs independence). Spain has strong regional identity politics (Catalonia, Basque Country). These are sensitive topics that learners should approach with curiosity rather than strong opinions.
